SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-28-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-28-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY DONNA FLORES ALBERTO, LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT KEVIN JOSUE LOPEZ PERALTA IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-28-2017 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. (FOMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PERALTA, KEVIN JOSUE LOPEZ $951.16 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,036.16 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
